As I sit here, I can faintly hear the hustle and bustle outside. It's a peaceful afternoon.
It feels narrow yet wide.
This is a really confusing office.
Usually, in this office,
there are only the two of us sitting.
It's nice when my field of vision opens up.
But in this landscape, it's not something to be thankful for.
I wonder,
what they are doing.
I'm glad it's quiet, but not knowing what they're doing is kind of scary.
I hope they're not accessing the internet and doing something weird.
Surprise, peach tree, prickly ash tree.
That's the kind of vibe, right?
Cindy came to this dirty office, after all.
Sorry for the dirty office.
Cindy is really cute even in person. It really tickles my trendy heart.
It's nice to know a celebrity, isn't it?
Alright, let's do our best and get to work!
Hehe, uhuhuh.
Yay, we did it, Boss!
I'm so grateful for Cindy!
I can't believe she's Meryl's daughter.
With this, Meryl's request is all set.
The issue is whether Cindy will meet her birth mother.
Ugh, saying that kind of thing again.
But with how it was earlier, it might be no good.
It's a little awkward to tell Meryl.
Still, it's a situation where neither side can say anything.
Ahh
, I've got a headache!
What should I do?
How are you doing?
Are you feeling well?
I guess everything's okay for now.
I hope they recover like this.
I'll try to drop by when I have some free time.
Boss
I was thinking, if we go to NETS, we might find out where Guy is heading.
Cindy
NETS is the baseball team Guy belongs to.
I see, if the off-season players are traveling, they probably have an emergency contact.
The team must know, right?
Sometimes you actually say something sensible.
Boss, I'm always the best!
Well then, I guess I'll go check out NETS now.
Yeah, that's the best idea!
The article about Cindy and Guy was a bit strange, wasn't it?
According to Cindy, at least.
Maybe it was an article set up by Gloria and Guy?
What would be the point of that?
I don't know.
But, you know...
Maybe Gloria and Guy are dating...
Just kidding, right?
Hehe, heh-heh, hee hee!
Yes, yes,
that was correct.
Hehe, I'm a genius! Being a detective's assistant is such a waste; I'm just too amazing!
Hahaha
Praising yourself is something, isn't it?
Bu
Ugh, just because you're envious of my talent, you say something cruel, Boss, that's not very manly.
Ugh!
But, this puts me at ease, right? Meryl's request is okay, isn't it? Hehe.
That's right. All that's left is for her to meet Meryl.
Ah, doing good things for others feels nice.
Hey.
It feels like we just need a little more effort now.
I can't believe I was actually disliked.
Isn't that a bit shocking?
Who’s talking about who being disliked?
So, it's about Gloria being disliked by Cindy.
I thought those two were really good friends.
They didn't seem to have a bad rapport at the party.
Did something happen afterward?
Ugh.
Hmm, maybe it's just a lovers' quarrel.
Should we tell Gloria where Cindy is?
If we do that now, Cindy might get upset and refuse to meet Meryl.
Y-Yeah, that's true.
Being clumsily kind might backfire.
Poor Gloria, she seems a bit pitiful.
Somehow, I feel like Günter is kind of creepy.
That’s a rude thing to say.
Why do you think that?
No, it's just a feeling.
Huh.
Ugh.
You shouldn't judge people just because of a vague feeling, seriously.
True, the teacher does have a nervous face. But, I don’t think it’s good to judge people by their looks.
No, I'm not saying anything about looks, it's more about the vibe I don't like.
Boss, don’t you have something on your mind?
No
I don't think there's such a thing.
Can you really say that?
Are you sure about that?
There's a feeling that the teacher can see right into your heart, isn't there?
The information about Gabriela is surely accurate.
Of course, right?
You were probably doing something like schedule management.
Then, it must be Tonny who's the culprit.
Hehehe, I'm like a real-life Holmes with my sharp mind, aren't I?
We need to hurry and find her, for Gabriela's sake!
Let's track him down!
So, Tonny Ford will finally be arrested, huh?
We still don't know if he's the culprit.
No, it must be him without a doubt. Such a woman's enemy should be judged by the law.
We have to confront Tonny.
You've met with Tonny, right?
Yeah.
I met him, but...
I felt like he was dodging my questions.
That’s how it felt.
That’s not good, is it?
You need to be more assertive with guys like him!
Then,
you go.
No way, he might be a murderer!
This kind of thing is a man's job.
Tsk, this is reverse sexual harassment.
Boss, please gather your courage and do your best!
I'm cheering for you here.
Come on, Boss! Give it your all for the women of the world!
The feeling is definitely black, right?
Well, it seems like he's done some drugs or something before that.
The conversation just doesn't click.
W-What, are we talking about drugs now?! Seriously, what a horrible person.
I totally think Tonny is the culprit, though.
Tim always looks so plain, yet he's with Cindy. Doesn't that sound kind of unbelievable?
I wouldn't say it's unbelievable. I think a guy like Tim would really cherish someone like Cindy.
Cindy must have a good eye for people.
If Cindy is at Tim's house, that means they’re living together.
That’s probably true. I mean, where would Cindy go without any family?
That might be the case, but she’s so much younger than me, and she’s living with a guy.
Kids these days.
Huh.
I wish he were just a little more charming.
Cindy is Meryl's daughter.
Knowing that, they still can't reveal their true identities. Meryl never liked Cindy much.
I think getting Cindy and Meryl to meet would be quite a challenge.
But at least I need to report that her daughter has been found.
I bet she would want to meet her right away after I report it.
I'd love for her to recover like this, but I don't think a fundamental solution is possible until the matter with Guy is resolved.
Thinking about her really reminds me how fragile the human heart can be.
She’s probably okay since she’s been going to counseling.
Was she tired from working? Or did she want to escape from Gloria?
She might meet Tim at his house, but will she agree to meet her birth mother, Meryl?
I hope she can somehow muster the will to meet Meryl.
I was surprised that Cindy hated Gloria. What would happen to Gloria if Cindy never came back?
Gloria must be feeling at her wits' end right about now.
Also,
I don't want to speak ill of Dr. Gunter, but I just can't bring myself to like him.
To be precise, I feel a certain sketchiness about him.
I wonder where this distrust of him is coming from.
He seemed terribly tired, but did he end up with new worries?
If I could just know about his life or death, I think I would feel a bit relieved.
Tony was incoherent and seemed to be on drugs.
What he was saying was in a state of a broken person.
I met Tony, but I came back without hearing anything. Next time, I need to get him to open up more.
Just because Tony is the last customer doesn't mean I can directly link him to the suspect, but I have to meet him and listen.
According to Gabriela, there was some bad blood between Jennifer and
others.
It's quite a shocking fact that Jennifer's name comes up like this.
But even if Jennifer harbored resentment,
I wonder if she would really kill Ginny.
Is there any basis for that kind of story?
I hate to say this, but Jennifer seems to be a person who causes various problems.
I hadn't spoken to Tim properly, but he must be a nice boy to be liked by Cindy.
He seemed like the type who struggles with social interactions.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
